findings.description: The hints for s3 do not include `expectedMessageByClient` and `responseMessageByClient`, which are column names in the testShots table described in the source. These are searchable property names that users may query about.
findings.source_evidence: Source table lists columns: expectedMessageByClient (HTTPメッセージ同期送信処理の期待する要求電文グループID) and responseMessageByClient (HTTPメッセージ同期送信処理の返却する応答電文グループID)

findings.description: The hints for s6 do not include `StringDataType`, which is the PascalCase class name (`nablarch.test.core.file.StringDataType`) used in the fixedLengthConvertorSetting XML configuration example for TEST_X9 and TEST_SX9 entries.
